ddls:
CREATE TABLE "images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "image_name" TEXT /* Name of the image file */,
  "patient_id" TEXT /* ID of the patient the image belongs to */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the patient */,
  "age_approx" INTEGER /* Approximate age of the patient */,
  "diagnosis" TEXT /* Diagnosis assigned to the image */,
  "benign_malignant" TEXT /* Benign or malignant classification of the image */,
  "target" INTEGER /* Target value for the image */,
  "tfrecord" INTEGER /* TFRecord associated with the image */,
  "date_uploaded" TEXT /* Date when the image was uploaded */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the image */,
  "image_type" TEXT /* Type of medical image */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the machine learning model's diagnosis */,
  "review_status" TEXT /* Review status of the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_diagnosis FOREIGN KEY ("diagnosis") REFERENCES diagnoses ("diagnosis_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_uploaded_by FOREIGN KEY ("uploaded_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "patient_name" TEXT /* Full name of the patient */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the patient */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Medical history of the patient */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the patient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the patient */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact information */,
  "consent_status" TEXT /* Consent status for research use */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diagnoses" (
  "diagnosis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each diagnosis */,
  "diagnosis_name" TEXT /* Name of the diagnosis */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the diagnosis */,
  "icd_code" TEXT /* ICD code for the diagnosis */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the diagnosis */,
  "treatment_options" TEXT /* Treatment options for the diagnosis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("diagnosis_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image the feature belongs to */,
  "width" INTEGER /* Width of the image */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the image */,
  "path" TEXT /* Path to the image file */,
  "fold" INTEGER /* Fold of the image */,
  "is_ext" INTEGER /* Whether the image is external */,
  "anatom_site_general" TEXT /* Anatomical site of the image */,
  "ratio" REAL /* Ratio of the image */,
  "mean" REAL /* Mean of the image */,
  "std" REAL /* Standard deviation of the image */,
  "mean_norm" REAL /* Normalized mean of the image */,
  "std_norm" REAL /* Normalized standard deviation of the image */,
  "feature_extraction_method" TEXT /* Method used for feature extraction */,
  "feature_extraction_date" TEXT /* Date when the features were extracted */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval of the feature extraction process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_features_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, clinician, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Date of the last activity */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the image */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the image was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access (in seconds) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_access_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image being annotated */,
  "annotation" TEXT /* Annotation text */,
  "annotator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the annotation */,
  "annotation_date" TEXT /* Date when the annotation was made */,
  "annotation_status" TEXT /* Status of the annotation */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the annotation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_annotations_annotator_id FOREIGN KEY ("annotator_id") REFERENCES annotators ("annotator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_annotations_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotators" (
  "annotator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotator */,
  "annotator_name" TEXT /* Full name of the annotator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the annotator */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the annotator */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization of the annotator */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution where the annotator is affiliated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotator_id")
)
